eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN ADMINISTRATIVE MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Pinal, AZ; at 01:25 AM ON MAY 14, 2026 Effective until 09:25 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: A SAFE Alert has been issued for Pinal County Sheriff's Office. This is the Arizona Department of Public Safety. Pinal County Sheriff's Office is looking for Sarkis Kalantarzadeh. Sarkis was last seen on May 12th, 2026, at unknown hours, on foot near Mountain View Rd and Superstition Blvd in Apache Junction. Sarkis is believed to be wearing and unknown color shirt, silver shorts and sandals. He is 6'3" tall, 170 lbs, with black hair and brown eyes. Sarkis suffers from a medical condition(s) and may become disoriented or easily confused. If you have contact with this SAFE Alert, please call 911. Monitor TV and Radio for updates.
